title: A láp virága
writer: Dezsõ Ákos Hamza, Ferenc Herczeg, Péter Rákóczi
actors: Pál Jávor, Alice Fényes, László Baksa Soós
plot: Miklós Pálfalvy, the easy-going son of a wealthy landowner, gets involved in bill forgery. The fake paper falls into the hands of his future father-in-law, the banker Mihályi, who blackmails the young man with it. Miklós breaks up...
